Transformative Beauty

Crafting stunning, transformative looks that make you feel truly satisfied on your special day.

Book Your Session

Dedicated Artistry, Stunning Results

Makeup by Hashini Trichy is renowned for delivering exceptional and dedicated artistry. Praised as one of the finest makeup artists, Hashini ensures a memorable and beautiful experience, crafting looks that guarantee satisfaction.

  • Exceptional Artistry: Consistently delivers stunning and satisfying looks.
  • Guaranteed Results: Highly skilled techniques for a flawless finish.
  • Transformative Experience: Perfect for weddings, photoshoots, and any special occasion.

Our Signature Services

We specialize in creating personalized looks that enhance your natural beauty for any event.

Bridal Makeup

An unforgettable look for your most important day. We ensure you are radiant, confident, and picture-perfect from ceremony to reception.

Photoshoot Glam

Camera-ready makeup that looks flawless on screen and in print. Ideal for engagement shoots, portraits, and commercial work.

Special Occasions

Whether it's a party, gala, or family function, we create a sophisticated and elegant look tailored to your event and style.

Portfolio of Transformations

A gallery of our work, showcasing the artistry and skill we bring to every client.

What Our Clients Say

Real stories from clients who have experienced the magic of Makeup by Hashini.

"Am happy with the service and makeup look was really satisfied. she made my day and such a sweet character 😍😍😍"

- priya shankaran

"One of the finest Mua.... She is so dedicated in her work. A guaranteed artist u must choose for ur occasions"

- BRIDAL GALLERY Trichy Rental Jewelry

"I got marriage look with hashini. Her work is good, but attitude is not good while speaking with my family, they were disappointed..."

- divya murali
